tool_args.label: MTA Board Meeting December 2022 - Board Action Items

payload.title: MTA Board Action Items
payload.description: MTA Board meeting materials including joint minutes from November 30, 2022 meeting, procurement packages, staff summaries, and action items for the December 21, 2022 Board meeting.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: New Jamaica Bus Depot

payload.project_name: New Jamaica Bus Depot
payload.description: Design and construction of a new LEED certified bus depot facility at 165-18 Tuskegee Airmen Way, Queens, accommodating transition to 100% electric bus fleet with 272 Standard Bus Equivalent parking spaces. Contract awarded to Skanska USA Civil Northeast Inc. for $479,956,000.

tool_args.label: CBTC on the Crosstown Line (G Line)

payload.project_name: CBTC on the Crosstown Line (G Line)
payload.description: Design-build services to provide a wayside communication-based train control (CBTC) system on the NYCT G Line from Court Square station to Church Avenue station. Contract awarded to Crosstown Partners (TC Electric LLC and Thales Transport and Security) for $368,697,000 plus maintenance contract of $36,951,697.

tool_args.label: Rockaway Line Resiliency and Rehabilitation

payload.project_name: Rockaway Line Resiliency and Rehabilitation
payload.description: Rehabilitation and flood resiliency work along NYCT's Rockaway Line including viaduct repairs at Hammels Wye Campus, flood mitigation, new signal tower at Beach 105th Street Station, and replacement of electrical/mechanical components of the South Channel Bridge. Contract awarded to Schiavone Construction Co. LLC for $392,685,186.

tool_args.label: Park Avenue Viaduct Replacement Phase 1

payload.project_name: Park Avenue Viaduct Replacement Phase 1
payload.description: Replacement of Metro-North Railroad's Park Avenue Viaduct from north side of East 115th Street to south side of East 123rd Street in Manhattan. Contract awarded to Halmar International, LLC for $381,077,027.

tool_args.label: ADA Upgrades Package 4 - Elevators at Four Stations

payload.project_name: ADA Upgrades Package 4 - Elevators at Various Stations
payload.description: Installation of eight new elevators at four NYCT subway stations: Bay Ridge-95th Street (R Line, Brooklyn), Northern Boulevard (M/R/E Lines, Queens), 137th Street (1 Line, Manhattan), Parkchester-E. 177th Street (6 Line, Bronx). Contract awarded to J-Track - TC Electric JV for $145,885,000.

tool_args.label: Flood Mitigation at 26 Substations

payload.project_name: Flood Mitigation at Twenty-Six Substations
payload.description: Design, furnish and install flood mitigation elements at 26 NYCT substations (19 above grade, 7 below grade) in Brooklyn, Manhattan and Queens. Contract awarded to Tully Construction Co. Inc. for $112,654,261.

tool_args.label: Elevator Replacements at Various Stations (Manhattan & Queens)

payload.project_name: Elevator Replacements at Various Stations
payload.description: Replacement of nineteen elevators and ADA improvements at NYCT subway stations in Manhattan and Queens including 175th Street (A), 14th Street Union Square Complex (4/5/6/L/Q/R/W), 14th-8th Ave (A/C/E/L), 42nd-Times Square (N/Q/R/W), 125th Street (A/B/C/D), West 4th Street (A/B/C/D/E/F/M), Jackson Heights-Roosevelt Ave (E/F/M/R), 74th-Broadway (7), Lexington-53rd (E/M). Contract to Forte Construction Corp for $92,345,000.

tool_args.label: Railcar Acceptance and Testing Facility (Brooklyn)

payload.project_name: Railcar Acceptance and Testing Facility
payload.description: Design and construction of a new facility to test and accept rail cars for NYCT, including two indoor tracks each accommodating five railcars. Contract awarded to JTCM Partners for $91,900,000.

tool_args.label: Power Redundancy and Resiliency Improvements at Bronx-Whitestone and Verrazzano-Narrows Bridges

payload.project_name: Power Redundancy and Resiliency Improvements at Bronx-Whitestone and Verrazzano-Narrows Bridges
payload.description: Replacement of heating, air conditioning and sewer systems at BWB and VNB; new electronic power monitoring and lane control systems and electric substation upgrades at VNB; installation of new fiber optic cable for FDNY at BWB. Contract awarded to Hellman/PJS JV for $78,737,231.

tool_args.label: Jamaica Substation Replacement Project

payload.project_name: Jamaica Substation Replacement Project
payload.description: Design, fabrication and installation of a new AC/DC traction power substation along the LIRR Mainline Branch in Queens. Contract awarded to Verde Electric Corp. for $51,983,502.

tool_args.label: Replacement of Substations at Mamaroneck and Harrison (MNR)

payload.project_name: Replacement of Substations at Mamaroneck and Harrison
payload.description: Replacement of MNR AC traction power Substation 128 at Mamaroneck and Substation 178 at Harrison on the New Haven Line. Contract awarded to A.M. Rizzo Electrical Contractors, Inc. for $46,600,000.

tool_args.label: Replacement of Fulton Avenue and South Street Bridges (Mount Vernon)

payload.project_name: Replacement of Fulton Avenue and South Street Bridges
payload.description: Replacement of existing superstructure of Fulton Avenue and South Street bridges and rehabilitation of substructure of both bridges, plus relocation of MNR signal power, in Mount Vernon, New York. Contract awarded to Ecco III Enterprises, Inc. for $37,978,000.

tool_args.label: Hillside Fire Water Main Suppression System Replacement

payload.project_name: Hillside Fire Water Main Suppression System Replacement
payload.description: Update the fire protection system at LIRR's Hillside Maintenance Facility including new fire water supply loop, new fire water service from 183rd Street and 177th Street, and replacement of diesel fire pump. Contract awarded to Infinity Contracting Services Corp. for $19,996,000.

tool_args.label: Coney Island Abutment Wall & St. Marks Avenue Bridge Replacement

payload.project_name: Coney Island Abutment Wall & St. Marks Avenue Bridge Replacement
payload.description: Replacement of an abutment wall system in NYCT's Coney Island Yard Complex and replacement of the St. Marks Avenue Bridge between St. Marks Avenue and Prospect Place in Brooklyn. Contract awarded to Railroad Construction Company, Inc. for $19,564,820.

tool_args.label: Auto Fueling Systems Upgrade at Brewster & Harmon Train Yards

payload.project_name: Auto Fueling Systems Upgrade at Brewster & Harmon Train Yards
payload.description: Upgrade the auto fueling stations at MNR's Brewster and Harmon Train Yards including above-ground storage tank fueling stations. Contract awarded to Aventura Construction Corporation for $6,416,335.

tool_args.label: ADA P3 Accessibility Project (Elevated Accessibility Enhancements)

payload.project_name: ADA P3 Accessibility Project (Elevated Accessibility Enhancements)
payload.description: Design, construction, financing and maintenance of ADA accessibility upgrades at 13 stations throughout NYC, including installation of 21 new elevators and replacement of 14 elevators. First ADA elevator project awarded using the P3 model. Contract awarded for $965,257,102. Subordinated Contract Obligation up to $350 million for Capital Availability Payment.

tool_args.label: MTA Board Meeting December 21, 2022

payload.description: MTA Board meeting at 2 Broadway 20th Floor Board Room, New York, NY. Included presentations, budget adoption, procurement approvals, real estate items.

tool_args.label: MTA Board Meeting November 30, 2022

payload.description: MTA and Agencies Regular Board Meeting Joint Minutes. Public speakers session, Chair Lieber's remarks, strategies to lower operating costs, CFO presentation on 2023 budget, and various committee actions.

tool_args.label: Brooklyn Bus Network Redesign Draft Plan Release

payload.description: Chair Lieber announced release of new draft plan for the Brooklyn Bus Network Redesign, intended to simplify the network and improve connections, frequency, reliability, and bus speeds.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison Zone 1 and Combo Ticket Pilot Approval

payload.description: Board approval for establishing Grand Central Madison as LIRR/MNR Zone 1 station on a temporary pilot basis and launching a temporary fare pilot 'Combo Ticket' for trips combining travel on both LIRR and MNR.

tool_args.label: Automated Bus Lane Enforcement Camera Activation (Five Routes)

payload.description: Five routes now have activated automated bus lane enforcement cameras: S79 SBS, Bx12 SBS, Bx41 SBS, Q43 and Bx19. 60-day warning period; ticketing to begin when grace period expires in late December 2022.

tool_args.label: NYSDOT CMAQ Grant for Connecting Services

payload.description: Board approval to accept up to $365,000 in CMAQ grant from NYSDOT to support connecting services including connecting buses (Hudson Link, Newburgh-Beacon Shuttle, Dutchess LOOP, HARTransit), the Haverstraw-Ossining Ferry, the Newburgh-Beacon Ferry and Guaranteed Ride Home programs.

tool_args.label: Ninth MOU with City of Newburgh for Ferry Landing/Parking

payload.description: Board approval for Metro-North to enter into Ninth Memorandum of Understanding with City of Newburgh for reimbursement of lease payments for parking and ferry landing facilities used by Newburgh-Beacon ferry. Monthly rate of $21,916.

tool_args.label: Subway Crime Down 13+% November 2022

payload.claim_text: Reversing a concerning trend, in November subway crime was down 13+% versus the same week in 2021. Year-to-date, the agency is 6.5% below 2019 levels.
payload.subject: subway crime

tool_args.label: MTA Deficit Outyears $2.6-$2.9 Billion

payload.claim_text: The MTA's deficit is in the outyears, not 2023, and the deficits in the outyears is in the $2.6 to $2.9 billion range, which is an increase from the July plan.
payload.subject: MTA budget deficit

tool_args.label: Brooklyn Bus Redesign Increases Frequency on 24 Routes

payload.claim_text: The new draft plan increases frequency on 24 routes out of the 69 in Brooklyn and adds another five overnight routes and more connections to LIRR stations.
payload.subject: Brooklyn Bus Network Redesign

tool_args.label: Circulation Improvements at Grand Central - 42nd Street Station

payload.project_name: Circulation Improvements at Grand Central - 42nd Street Station
payload.description: Design-build services for circulation improvements at Grand Central - 42nd Street Station. Contract awarded to Skanska USA Civil Northeast Inc. for $74,470,000, duration 715 calendar days.

tool_args.label: Laser Intrusion Detection System in Thirteen Underwater Subway Tubes

payload.project_name: Laser Intrusion Detection System in Thirteen Underwater Subway Tubes and Twenty-Nine Stations
payload.description: Design-build services to provide a laser intrusion detection system in thirteen underwater subway tubes and twenty-nine stations. Contract awarded to CRC Associates Inc. for $52,550,000, duration 1460 calendar days.

tool_args.label: Accessibility Upgrades at Borough Hall Station

payload.project_name: Accessibility Upgrades at Borough Hall Station
payload.description: Design and construction of accessibility upgrades at the Borough Hall Station. Contract awarded to Judlau Contracting, Inc. for $106,398,530, duration 852 calendar days.

tool_args.label: New Railroad Bridge and Two Mainline Tracks in Hall Interlocking

payload.project_name: New Railroad Bridge and Two New Mainline Tracks in Hall Interlocking
payload.description: Design-build services for a new railroad bridge and two new mainline tracks in Hall Interlocking. Contract awarded to MLJT (MLJ Contracting Corp. and J-Track LLC) for $91,794,500, duration 1008 calendar days.

tool_args.label: LIRR Service Increase 40% via Grand Central Madison and Third Track

payload.raw_value_text: Together with Third Track, the MTA will increase LIRR service by 40%

tool_args.label: Year-to-Date Subway Crime 6.5% Below 2019 Levels

payload.raw_value_text: year-to-date, the agency is 6.5% below 2019 levels

tool_args.label: MTA Identified and Eliminated $3 Billion in Operating Costs (2010-2018)

payload.raw_value_text: Between 2010 and 2018...the agency identified and eliminated $3 billion of recurring operating budget costs

tool_args.label: New York State Department of Transportation

payload.entity_name: New York State Department of Transportation

tool_args.label: City of Newburgh, New York
Rite-Aid Corporation
Yaphank Landfill Remediation Project

payload.project_name: Yaphank Landfill Remediation Project
payload.description: Investigation and remediation of the Yaphank Landfill (Town of Brookhaven Landfill) site - cleanup of surface and subsurface contamination. Board authorization to acquire temporary and permanent easements from three adjacent property owners (Nicola Ready Mix, Asbestos Transportation Company, Frank Dolinski) through negotiated agreement or eminent domain.

tool_args.label: Rite-Aid Surrender and Early Termination of Grand Central Terminal Lease

payload.description: Surrender and early termination agreement with Rite-Aid for its lease in Grand Central Terminal (Space MC-10 Main Concourse, 7,500 sq ft). Rite-Aid to remain open through Dec 31, 2023, surrender Feb 29, 2024, pay reduced rent at 33% of minimum rent plus an early termination fee of $8,900,000.

tool_args.label: Acquisition of Easements for Penn Station Access Project

payload.claim_text: MTA seeks authorization to acquire one permanent exclusive easement and two non-exclusive access easements at NYC Parks' Hutchinson River Parkway Extension in the Bronx in support of the Penn Station Access Project for Amtrak's Hell Gate Line ROW augmentations near the proposed Co-op City Station.
payload.subject: Penn Station Access Project
